channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17789] PCC: sanity-pcc/test_21d failed with inconsistent data
item.description:
The sanity-pcc/test_21d failed with the following output:

   lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 0
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 0, l_fid: [0x240000400:0x2:0x0] }


  - lcme_id:             131074
    lcme_mirror_id:      2
    lcme_flags:          init,stale
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
    lcme_offset:         184
    lcme_size:           72
    sub_layout:
      lhm_magic:         0x0BD70BD0
      lhm_pattern:       hsm
      lhm_length:        56
      lhm_type:          0x00000003 (pccro)
      lhm_flags:         exists,dirty,archived,0xb
      lhm_archive_id:    0
      lhm_archive_ver:   0
      lhm_archive_uuid:  ''
 sanity-pcc test_21d: @@@@@@ FAIL: expected /mnt/lustre/f21d.sanity-pcc: write_mod_data, got: write_mod_dataa 
  Trace dump:
  = /root/work/PCC/lustre-release.git/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6664:error()
  = ./sanity-pcc.sh:108:check_file_data()
  = ./sanity-pcc.sh:1977:test_21d()
  = /root/work/PCC/lustre-release.git/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6991:run_one()
  = /root/work/PCC/lustre-release.git/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7041:run_one_logged()
  = /root/work/PCC/lustre-release.git/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6865:run_test()
  = ./sanity-pcc.sh:1979:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/1714358650/sanity-pcc.test_21d.*.1714358682.log
Dumping logs only on local client.
debug=super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console lfsck
debug=super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console lfsck
Cleanup PCC backend on /mnt/lustre
debug_mb=256
/mnt/pcc.d21d.sanity-pcc is idle now
FAIL 21d (1s)
item.summary: PCC: sanity-pcc/test_21d failed with inconsistent data

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
This bug was first found in Maloo testing about PCCRO on master.

But I searched, can not find the Maloo testing log any more.

However, I can reproduce it each time on my local testing (rhel8.5-2111) env via:

ONLY="21d" REFORMAT=yes ./sanity-pcc.sh

 

But I have no idea why Maloo testing does not reproduce it...

Yinjin, it is most helpful if you create tickets via the "[Raise bug...]" link on a test failure in Maloo, if that is where this failure happened. That links to all of the logs, versions being tested, etc.

If it was hit at a customer site, please link this ticket to the original customer ticket.

Otherwise it is difficult to know the details of the failure.
